name: Apricot-Orange Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apricot nectar, orange juice, water, sugar, and cinnamon in a medium-size saucepan.
2. Insert cloves into each lemon slice; add to the saucepan.
3. Heat mixture just to boiling; reduce heat; cover. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in tea.
Serve hot.
